summary: Comprehensive testing of Major Update Batch 2 (deposits editable, calendar improvements, vacancy sorting, parking filters, has_parking checkbox). Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

minor.issue: has_parking field returns null for legacy tenants (acceptable - frontend handles this)
minor.note: Not a bug - new field defaults to false in frontend

console_warnings.issue: React HTML nesting warnings - <tr> in <span>, <span> in <tbody> - minor, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major batch 2 fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Deposits page has edit buttons on all 3 tabs with Past/Future Tenant status badges. 2) Calendar shows tenant bars with dark tooltip text, clicking opens TenantDetailModal. 3) Vacancy page has 'By Property' and 'By Date' sort toggle buttons. 4) Income page monthly average is calculated correctly (based on months up to current). 5) Parking page has tenant search, property+parking filter, unit display. 6) Tenants page has 'Has parking spot' checkbox in edit form.

deposits_current_endpoint.notes: GET /api/deposits/current returns deposits with tenant status (move_in_date, move_out_date)

tenant_update_deposit_fields.notes: Tenants have deposit_amount, deposit_date, payment_method fields

calendar_page_loading.notes: Calendar page loads without errors, 11 tenant booking bars visible

calendar_tooltip_dark_text.notes: Tooltip shows dark text on light background - tenant name, type, dates, rent visible

calendar_tenant_click_modal.notes: Clicking tenant bar opens TenantDetailModal (not navigate away)

deposits_edit_buttons.notes: Edit buttons visible on Current Deposits tab (3 edit buttons)

deposits_status_badges.notes: Past Tenant / Future Tenant badges visible

vacancy_sort_buttons.notes: 'By Property' and 'By Date' buttons visible and working

parking_tenant_search.notes: Search input in tenant assignment dialog with 'Search tenants...' placeholder

parking_unit_display.notes: Tenant list shows '(Property - Unit X)' format

tenants_has_parking_checkbox.notes: 'Has parking spot' checkbox visible in tenant edit form under Parking Info section

tenant_detail_modal.notes: TenantDetailModal opens and shows tenant info correctly

no_console_errors.notes: Only minor React HTML nesting warnings - no functional issues
